title: They Said So Quotes + Verse of the Day
description: Daily quotes across categories from They Said So, plus a daily Bible verse from They Said So with an official Bible Gateway Atom fallback.

items.title: Do question, even the basics!You will be a fool for once!If you don't, you will be, for a lifetime. - Himmilicious
items.content_text: Do question, even the basics!You will be a fool for once!If you don't, you will be, for a lifetime. - Himmilicious

items.title: A master in the art of living draws no sharp distinction between his work and his play; his labor and his leisure; his mind and his body; his education & his recreation. He hardly knows which is which. He simply pursues his vision of excellence through whatever he is doing, and leaves others to dete
items.content_text: A master in the art of living draws no sharp distinction between his work and his play; his labor and his leisure; his mind and his body; his education & his recreation. He hardly knows which is which. He simply pursues his vision of excellence through whatever he is doing, and leaves others to determine whether he is working or playing. To himself, he always appears to be doing both. - François-René de Chateaubriand

items.title: Boy were we poor, if I wasn't born a boy I would of had nothing to play with. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: Boy were we poor, if I wasn't born a boy I would of had nothing to play with. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Bodybuilding is much like any other sport. To be successful, you must dedicate yourself 100% to your training, diet and mental approach. - Arnold Schwarzenegger
items.content_text: Bodybuilding is much like any other sport. To be successful, you must dedicate yourself 100% to your training, diet and mental approach. - Arnold Schwarzenegger

items.title: A leader is the wave pushed ahead by the ship. - Leo Nikolaevich Tolstoy
items.content_text: A leader is the wave pushed ahead by the ship. - Leo Nikolaevich Tolstoy

items.title: Love means not ever having to say you're sorry. - Erich Segal
items.content_text: Love means not ever having to say you're sorry. - Erich Segal

items.title: It is inevitable that some defeat will enter even the most victorious life. The human spirit is never finished when it is defeated.. It is finished when it surrenders. - Ben Stein
items.content_text: It is inevitable that some defeat will enter even the most victorious life. The human spirit is never finished when it is defeated.. It is finished when it surrenders. - Ben Stein

items.title: When it comes to winning, you need the skill and the will. - Frank Tyger
items.content_text: When it comes to winning, you need the skill and the will. - Frank Tyger

items.title: Matthew 16:15-16
items.content_text: ““But what about you?” he asked. “Who do you say I am?”  Simon Peter answered, “You are the Messiah, the Son of the living God.””

items.title: Mr. Klamp laid down the law. No tardiness, no talking above 40 decibels, no untied shoelaces, no visible undergarments, no eating, no chewing gum, no chewing tobacco, no chewing betel nuts, no chewing coca leaves, no chewing out students (unless Mr. Klamp was doing the chewing out), no chewing out t
items.content_text: Mr. Klamp laid down the law. No tardiness, no talking above 40 decibels, no untied shoelaces, no visible undergarments, no eating, no chewing gum, no chewing tobacco, no chewing betel nuts, no chewing coca leaves, no chewing out students (unless Mr. Klamp was doing the chewing out), no chewing out teachers (unless ditto), no unnecessary displays of temper (unless ditto), no unnecessary displays of affection (no exceptions), no pets over one ounce or under one ton, and no singing, except in Bulgarian. I began to think Mr Klamp wouldn't be so bad.. - Polly Shulman

items.title: Art produces ugly things which frequently become more beautiful with time. Fashion, on the other hand, produces beautiful things which always become ugly with time. - Jean  Cocteau
items.content_text: Art produces ugly things which frequently become more beautiful with time. Fashion, on the other hand, produces beautiful things which always become ugly with time. - Jean  Cocteau

items.title: Once I opened up a fortune cookie and inside was the guy's cheque next to me I said hey buddy I got your cheque he said thanks - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: Once I opened up a fortune cookie and inside was the guy's cheque next to me I said hey buddy I got your cheque he said thanks - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: I don't know any other way to lead but by example. - Don Shula
items.content_text: I don't know any other way to lead but by example. - Don Shula

items.title: It is better to lead from behind and to put others in front, especially when you celebrate victory when nice things occur. You take the front line when there is danger. Then people will appreciate your leadership. - Nelson Mandela
items.content_text: It is better to lead from behind and to put others in front, especially when you celebrate victory when nice things occur. You take the front line when there is danger. Then people will appreciate your leadership. - Nelson Mandela

items.title: Love is a smoke made with the fume of sighs. - William Shakespeare
items.content_text: Love is a smoke made with the fume of sighs. - William Shakespeare

items.title: God writes a lot of comedy.. The trouble is, he's stuck with so many bad actors who don't know how to play funny. - Garrison Keillor
items.content_text: God writes a lot of comedy.. The trouble is, he's stuck with so many bad actors who don't know how to play funny. - Garrison Keillor

items.title: Those who know how to win are much more numerous than those who know how to make proper use of their victories - Polybius
items.content_text: Those who know how to win are much more numerous than those who know how to make proper use of their victories - Polybius

items.title: The chief wonder of education is that it does not ruin everybody concerned in it, teachers and taught. - Henry Adams
items.content_text: The chief wonder of education is that it does not ruin everybody concerned in it, teachers and taught. - Henry Adams

items.title: Painting, n.: The art of protecting flat surfaces from the weather, and exposing them to the critic. - Ambrose Bierce
items.content_text: Painting, n.: The art of protecting flat surfaces from the weather, and exposing them to the critic. - Ambrose Bierce

items.title: My wife has to be the worst cook. In my house, we pray after we eat. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: My wife has to be the worst cook. In my house, we pray after we eat. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Baseball hasn't been the national pastime for many years now - no sport is. The national pastime, like it or not, is watching television. - Bob Greene
items.content_text: Baseball hasn't been the national pastime for many years now - no sport is. The national pastime, like it or not, is watching television. - Bob Greene

items.title: The leader is one who mobilizes others toward a goal shared by leaders and followers.. Leaders, followers and goals make up the three equally necessary supports for leadership. - Gary Wills
items.content_text: The leader is one who mobilizes others toward a goal shared by leaders and followers.. Leaders, followers and goals make up the three equally necessary supports for leadership. - Gary Wills

items.title: Love is much nicer to be in than an automobile accident, a tight girdle, a higher tax bracket or a holding pattern over Philadelphia. - Judith Viorst
items.content_text: Love is much nicer to be in than an automobile accident, a tight girdle, a higher tax bracket or a holding pattern over Philadelphia. - Judith Viorst

items.title: Life is not an exact science, it is an art. - Samuel  Butler
items.content_text: Life is not an exact science, it is an art. - Samuel  Butler

items.title: Winning isn't everything.. It's the only thing. - Vincent van Gogh
items.content_text: Winning isn't everything.. It's the only thing. - Vincent van Gogh

items.title: An exceedingly confident student would in theory make a terrible student. Why would he take school seriously when he feels that he can outwit his teachers? - Criss Jami
items.content_text: An exceedingly confident student would in theory make a terrible student. Why would he take school seriously when he feels that he can outwit his teachers? - Criss Jami

items.title: The artist is nothing without the gift, but the gift is nothing without work. - Emile Zola
items.content_text: The artist is nothing without the gift, but the gift is nothing without work. - Emile Zola

items.title: Why her cooking is so bad that the flies pitched in to fix the screen door. I leave dental floss in the kitchen and watch the roaches hang themselves. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: Why her cooking is so bad that the flies pitched in to fix the screen door. I leave dental floss in the kitchen and watch the roaches hang themselves. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Black people dominate sports in the United States. 20% of the population and 90% of the final four. We own this shit. Basketball, baseball, football, golf, tennis, and as soon as they make a heated hockey rink we'll take that shit too. - Chris Rock
items.content_text: Black people dominate sports in the United States. 20% of the population and 90% of the final four. We own this shit. Basketball, baseball, football, golf, tennis, and as soon as they make a heated hockey rink we'll take that shit too. - Chris Rock

items.title: If you think you're leading and no one is following you, then you're only taking a walk. - Afghan Proverb
items.content_text: If you think you're leading and no one is following you, then you're only taking a walk. - Afghan Proverb

items.title: Stand by your man. Give him two arms to cling to and something warm to come to. - Tammy Wynette
items.content_text: Stand by your man. Give him two arms to cling to and something warm to come to. - Tammy Wynette

items.title: The purpose of art is washing the dust of daily life off our souls. - Pablo Picasso
items.content_text: The purpose of art is washing the dust of daily life off our souls. - Pablo Picasso

items.title: A quitter never wins and a winner never quits - Napoleon Hill
items.content_text: A quitter never wins and a winner never quits - Napoleon Hill

items.title: The purpose of school should not be to prepare students for more school. We should be seeking to have fully engaged students now. - Donalyn Miller
items.content_text: The purpose of school should not be to prepare students for more school. We should be seeking to have fully engaged students now. - Donalyn Miller

items.title: A piece of art is never a finished work. It answers a question which has been asked, and asks a new question. - Robert Engman
items.content_text: A piece of art is never a finished work. It answers a question which has been asked, and asks a new question. - Robert Engman

items.title: One night she told me to put out the garbage. I told her you cooked it, you take it out. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: One night she told me to put out the garbage. I told her you cooked it, you take it out. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: What the British must never believe about themselves is that they are good at games, strong in adversity, but lousy in bed. It is a myth invented by jealous foreigners. - Gerald McKnight
items.content_text: What the British must never believe about themselves is that they are good at games, strong in adversity, but lousy in bed. It is a myth invented by jealous foreigners. - Gerald McKnight

items.title: All of the great leaders have had one characteristic in common: it was the willingness to confront unequivocally the major anxiety of their people in their time. This, and not much else, is the essence of leadership. - John Kenneth Galbraith
items.content_text: All of the great leaders have had one characteristic in common: it was the willingness to confront unequivocally the major anxiety of their people in their time. This, and not much else, is the essence of leadership. - John Kenneth Galbraith

items.title: To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause enough. But it is a hard quest worth making to find a comrade through whose steady presence one becomes steadily the person one desires to be. - Elijah Wood
items.content_text: To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause enough. But it is a hard quest worth making to find a comrade through whose steady presence one becomes steadily the person one desires to be. - Elijah Wood

items.title: I am now going to make you a gift that will stay with you the rest of your life. For the rest of your life, every time you say 'We've always done it that way,' my ghost will appear and haunt you for twentyfour hours. - Grace Murray Hopper
items.content_text: I am now going to make you a gift that will stay with you the rest of your life. For the rest of your life, every time you say 'We've always done it that way,' my ghost will appear and haunt you for twentyfour hours. - Grace Murray Hopper

items.title: The real winners in life are the people who look at every situation with an expectation that they can make it work or make it better - Barbara Pletcher
items.content_text: The real winners in life are the people who look at every situation with an expectation that they can make it work or make it better - Barbara Pletcher

items.title: By starving the sensibility of our pupils we only make them easier prey to the propagandist when he comes. For famished nature will be avenged and a hard heart is no infallible protection against a soft head. - C.S. Lewis
items.content_text: By starving the sensibility of our pupils we only make them easier prey to the propagandist when he comes. For famished nature will be avenged and a hard heart is no infallible protection against a soft head. - C.S. Lewis

items.title: Art reaches its greatest peak when devoid of self-consciousness. Freedom discovers man the moment he loses concern over what impression he is making or about to make. - Bruce Lee
items.content_text: Art reaches its greatest peak when devoid of self-consciousness. Freedom discovers man the moment he loses concern over what impression he is making or about to make. - Bruce Lee

items.title: For Christmas one year I bought my son a BB gun. He bought me a tshirt with a bulls eye on the back. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: For Christmas one year I bought my son a BB gun. He bought me a tshirt with a bulls eye on the back. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Anybody with ability can play in the big leagues. But to be able to trick people year in and year out the way I did, I think that was a much greater feat. - Bob Uecker
items.content_text: Anybody with ability can play in the big leagues. But to be able to trick people year in and year out the way I did, I think that was a much greater feat. - Bob Uecker

items.title: The only real training for leadership is leadership. - Anthony Jay
items.content_text: The only real training for leadership is leadership. - Anthony Jay

items.title: A man in love is incomplete until he has married. Then he's finished. - Zsa Zsa Gabor
items.content_text: A man in love is incomplete until he has married. Then he's finished. - Zsa Zsa Gabor

items.title: Perpetual inspiration is as necessary to the life of goodness, holiness and happiness as perpetual respiration is necessary to animal life. - Andrew Bonar Law
items.content_text: Perpetual inspiration is as necessary to the life of goodness, holiness and happiness as perpetual respiration is necessary to animal life. - Andrew Bonar Law

items.title: Winners have simply formed the habit of doing things losers don't like to do - Albert Gray
items.content_text: Winners have simply formed the habit of doing things losers don't like to do - Albert Gray

items.title: Do you want to achieve something or do you just want to make money? Asked a nearby man in a white shirt to another man in a striped shirt. I waited for the answer as I slowly walked past them. Why is it an either or question? The man in the striped shirt finally murmured philosophically under a sip
items.content_text: Do you want to achieve something or do you just want to make money? Asked a nearby man in a white shirt to another man in a striped shirt. I waited for the answer as I slowly walked past them. Why is it an either or question? The man in the striped shirt finally murmured philosophically under a sip of beer. They both stood there looking at each other in thought. - Daniel Amory

items.title: Art is when you hear a knocking from your soul and you answer. - Terri Guillemets
items.content_text: Art is when you hear a knocking from your soul and you answer. - Terri Guillemets

items.title: She looked at my calendar and wanted to know who JUNE was. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: She looked at my calendar and wanted to know who JUNE was. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Whoever wants to know the heart and mind of America had better learn baseball, the rules and realities of the game - and do it by watching first some high school or small-town teams. - Jacques Barzun
items.content_text: Whoever wants to know the heart and mind of America had better learn baseball, the rules and realities of the game - and do it by watching first some high school or small-town teams. - Jacques Barzun

items.title: Men make history, and not the other way around. In periods where there is no leadership, society stands still. Progress occurs when courageous, skillful leaders seize the opportunity to change things for the better. - Harry S Truman
items.content_text: Men make history, and not the other way around. In periods where there is no leadership, society stands still. Progress occurs when courageous, skillful leaders seize the opportunity to change things for the better. - Harry S Truman

items.title: Who will tell whether one happy moment of love or the joy of breathing or walking on a bright morning and smelling the fresh air, is not worth all the suffering and effort which life implies. - Erich Fromm
items.content_text: Who will tell whether one happy moment of love or the joy of breathing or walking on a bright morning and smelling the fresh air, is not worth all the suffering and effort which life implies. - Erich Fromm

items.title: I'm not naive. I realise that quality of life and income are inextricably bound together, but sooner or later we're going to have to ask ourselves whether it is possible to make life more meaningful without charging it to Visa. - Daron Hicklin
items.content_text: I'm not naive. I realise that quality of life and income are inextricably bound together, but sooner or later we're going to have to ask ourselves whether it is possible to make life more meaningful without charging it to Visa. - Daron Hicklin

items.title: Think ahead. Don't let day-to-day operations drive out planning. - Donald Rumsfeld
items.content_text: Think ahead. Don't let day-to-day operations drive out planning. - Donald Rumsfeld

items.title: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to
items.content_text: We, Equality 7-2521, were not happy in those year in the Home of the Students. It was not that the learning was too hard for us. It was that the learning was too easy. This is a great sin, to be born with a head which is too quick. It is not good to be different from our brothers, but it is evil to be superior to them. The Teachers told us so, and they frowned when they looked at us. - Ayn Rand

items.title: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso
items.content_text: To draw, you must close your eyes and sing. - Pablo Picasso

items.title: Boy is my wife stupid. It takes her and hour and a half to watch 60 minutes. My daughters no bargain either. In public school she was voted most likely to conceive. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: Boy is my wife stupid. It takes her and hour and a half to watch 60 minutes. My daughters no bargain either. In public school she was voted most likely to conceive. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra
items.content_text: Love is the most important thing in the world, but baseball is pretty good, too. - Yogi Berra

items.title: Great leaders are pragmatists who can deal with difficult realities but still have the optimism and courage to act. - Nitin Nohria
items.content_text: Great leaders are pragmatists who can deal with difficult realities but still have the optimism and courage to act. - Nitin Nohria

items.title: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown
items.content_text: About all you can do in life is be who you are. Some people will love you for you. Most will love you for what you can do for them, and some won't like you at all. - Rita Mae Brown

items.title: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined. As you simplify your life, the laws of the universe will be simpler. - Henry David Thoreau
items.content_text: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined. As you simplify your life, the laws of the universe will be simpler. - Henry David Thoreau

items.title: Let our advance worrying become advance thinking and planning. - Winston Churchill
items.content_text: Let our advance worrying become advance thinking and planning. - Winston Churchill

items.title: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morr
items.content_text: I tell my students, 'When you get these jobs that you have been so brilliantly trained for, just remember that your real job is that if you are free, you need to free somebody else. If you have some power, then your job is to empower somebody else. This is not just a grab-bag candy game. - Toni Morrison

items.title: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson
items.content_text: Art doesn't have to be pretty. It has to be meaningful. - Duane Hanson

items.title: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: She failed her drivers test. She couldn't get used to the front seat. It took her four lessons to learn to sit up. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros
items.content_text: By the time you get to your ball, if you don't know what to do with it, try another sport. - Julius Boros

items.title: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell
items.content_text: Never neglect details. When everyone's mind is dulled or distracted the leader must be doubly vigilant. - Colin Powell

items.title: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey
items.content_text: Not where I breathe, but where I love, I live Not where I love, but where I am, I die. - Robert Southey

items.title: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein
items.content_text: Only a life lived for others is a life worthwhile. - Albert Einstein

items.title: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman
items.content_text: If you want to test your memory, try to recall what you were worrying about one year ago today. - E. Joseph Cossman

items.title: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson
items.content_text: Rejection is an opportunity for your selection. - Bernard Branson

items.title: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz
items.content_text: The whole culture is telling you to hurry, while the art tells you to take your time. Always listen to the art. - Junot Diaz

items.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: I came from a real tough neighborhood. In the local restaurant I sat down and had broken leg of lamb. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty
items.content_text: Football isn't a contact sport, it's a collision sport. Dancing is a contact sport. - Duffy Daugherty

items.title: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger
items.content_text: The task of the leader is to get his people from where they are to where they have not been. - Henry Kissinger

items.title: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton
items.content_text: Love seeks one thing only the good of the one loved. It leaves all the other secondary effects to take care of themselves. Love, therefore, is its own reward. - Thomas Merton

items.title: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann
items.content_text: The only religious way to think of death is as a part and parcel of life to regard it, with the understanding and the emotions, as the inviolable condition of life. - Thomas Mann

items.title: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc
items.content_text: Luck is a dividend of sweat. The more you sweat, the luckier you get - Ray Kroc

items.title: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson
items.content_text: No student knows his subject: the most he knows is where and how to find out the things he does not know - Woodrow T. Wilson

items.title: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin
items.content_text: The main thing is to be moved, to love, to hope, to tremble, to live. - Auguste Rodin

items.title: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: I came from a real tough neighborhood. Once a guy pulled a knife on me. I knew he wasn't a professional, the knife had butter on it. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell
items.content_text: Serious sport has nothing to do with fair play. It is bound up with hatred, jealousy, boastfulness, disregard of all rules and sadistic pleasure in witnessing violence. In other words, it is war minus the shooting. - George Orwell

items.title: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie
items.content_text: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself, or to get all the credit for doing it - Andrew Carnegie

items.title: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain
items.content_text: Love seems the swiftest, but it is the slowest of growths. No man or woman really knows what perfect love is until they have been married a quarter of a century. - Mark Twain

items.title: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius
items.content_text: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing. - Marcus Aurelius

items.title: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis
items.content_text: There's such a thin line between winning and losing. - John R. Tunis

items.title: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps
items.content_text: A student never forgets an encouraging private word, when it is given with sincere respect and admiration. - William Lyon Phelps

items.title: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert
items.content_text: You don't make art out of good intentions. - Gustave Flaubert

items.title: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield
items.content_text: I once asked a policeman how far it was to the subway. He said, I don't know, no one has ever made it. - Rodney Dangerfield

items.title: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron
items.content_text: The triple is the most exciting play in baseball. Home runs win a lot of games, but I never understood why fans are so obsessed with them. - Hank Aaron

items.title: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature,
items.content_text: Leadership is a word and a concept that has been more argued than almost any other I know. I am not one of the desk-pounding types that likes to stick out his jaw and look like he is bossing the show. I would far rather get behind and, recognizing the frailties and the requirements of human nature, would rather try to persuade a man to go along, because once I have persuaded him, he will stick. If I scare him, he will stay just as long as he is scared, and then he is gone. - Dwight David Eisenhower

items.title: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh
items.content_text: Love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is done well. - Vincent Van Gogh

items.title: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery
items.content_text: Life has meaning only if one barters it day by day for something other than itself. - Antoine de SaintExupery

items.title: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
items.content_text: When you win, say nothing. When you lose, say less. - Paul Brown
